# PERF-239 positive: dense map[int] written many times in one function
lang: go
file: PERF-239-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

func buildOffsets(ids []int) map[int]int {
	offsets := make(map[int]int, 64)
	for _, id := range ids {
		offsets[id] = id * 10
	}
	offsets[1] = 10
	offsets[2] = 20
	offsets[3] = 30
	offsets[4] = 40
	offsets[5] = 50
	offsets[6] = 60
	return offsets
}
